summary: Backend verified end-to-end for iter93 punch/salary features (6/6 pytest passes) — day-status range endpoint (single-day + >31d 400 rejection), manual-punch seeding, PATCH keeps status=approved and sets edited_at driving row.updated=true, profile compliance_salary_mode + bio_code + duplicate employee_code=409. Frontend automation partially BLOCKED: cannot programmatically switch the GlobalCompanyPicker from 'All firms' to Kankani via Playwright. Clicks on [data-testid="global-company-picker-cmp_527fecdd7c"] register but commitSelection does not persist (trigger label stays 'All firms', localStorage skc:selected_company injection doesn't survive, and /firm-select route redirects back to /). This blocks E2E verification of Punch Approvals Auto/Manual/Updated tabs (data is company-scoped) and Attendance Grid data behavior for a chosen firm. VERIFIED via UI: punch-approvals screen structure (all By Status + By Source tabs, Single day/Periodic toggle, date+to-date inputs, Show/Save buttons all render with correct testIDs); Attendance Report screen with Hide Days 1–31 toggle (testID toggle-hide-days) DOES toggle correctly between 'Hide Days 1–31' and 'Show Days 1–31' labels — verified visually; Periodic mode correctly shows From+To date inputs (pa-date-input and pa-date-to-input).

ui_bugs.issue: Selecting a firm from the top-right picker via Playwright click on [data-testid="global-company-picker-cmp_527fecdd7c"] does not persist. Trigger label stays 'All firms' and downstream screens (Punch Approvals, Attendance Grid) continue to show 'Pick a firm first'. localStorage injection of skc:selected_company also doesn't take effect on reload — SelectedCompanyContext.tsx guards restore-from-storage by cross-checking against a companies fetch that may race. May be a real user-facing race for super-admin on cold load (needs a click, then a second click to stick). Recommend main agent add e2e-friendly path or verify picker commit path.

Navigating directly to /firm-select as super-admin (already authenticated) immediately redirects to / — the screen with [data-testid="firm-card-cmp_527fecdd7c"] never renders. This route seems restricted to logged-in flows that haven't yet chosen a firm, so E2E scripts cannot re-enter it to pick a firm.

integration_issues.flow: Punch Approvals — Auto-Punches / Manual Entries / Updated tabs, Save with prompt() reason
integration_issues.issue: Could not reach the data-rendering path because firm scope never activates in the automated session. Backend day-status returns the expected shape (verified via curl + pytest) so once the firm-picker blocker is unblocked the tab filtering + save flow should be testable.

integration_issues.flow: Attendance Grid — hide-days behaviour with data
integration_issues.issue: Hide-Days toggle label change verified (Hide→Show). Grid data hide/show for day columns 1–31 and Duty HRS summary column not verifiable without an active firm scope.

integration_issues.flow: Employee Master edit form — separate Actual vs Compliance Rate Basis persistence + '+ Set Salary' modal Rate Basis (Compliance) dropdown (compliance-basic-rate)
integration_issues.issue: Not tested (firm-picker blocker). Backend PATCH profile with compliance_salary_mode=daily persists correctly (verified in pytest). Recommend main agent self-test the two UI paths via manual desktop browser session where the firm picker responds to human clicks.

action_items: Investigate GlobalCompanyPicker commitSelection when triggered via synthetic click events (Playwright force=true). The picker option click currently doesn't set skc:selected_company / doesn't update trigger label — possibly because the outside-click handler on the panel closes it before onPress fires, or because commitSelection depends on a companies list that hasn't hydrated yet at first click.
Consider making /firm-select accessible on demand for authenticated super-admins (e.g. `?force=1` query) so E2E tests can deterministically choose a firm.

Main-agent self-test recommended for the 5 unverified UI paths: Punch Approvals Auto/Manual/Updated tab filters + Save via prompt(); Attendance Grid rectify/blank-HRS behavior with data; Attendance Grid Hide-Days column hiding with data; Employee Master edit form Actual+Compliance rate basis persistence; +Set Salary modal compliance-basic-rate dropdown persistence. Backend layer for all five is confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: punch-approvals.tsx testIDs are consistent and complete (tab-updated/tab-auto/tab-manual, pa-datemode-single/pa-datemode-period, pa-date-input, pa-date-to-input, pa-show, pa-save, ds-in-<key>, ds-out-<key>, ds-save-<key>). No lint/testID gaps observed.

day-status endpoint dedupes correctly per user|date and derives row.updated from any(edited_at) — verified. `edited` on individual cell reflects the specific record picked (first-in / last-out), which may differ from the record that was edited when multiple punches exist for same kind — acceptable per requirement (row-level updated flag is authoritative).
updated_files: /app/test_reports/iter93_seed.py (created; used for UI seed, cleaned up after run)

success_rate.frontend: 20% (structure + Hide-Days toggle label verified; data-driven flows blocked by firm-picker)

seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 manual punches on 2026-07-09 (SURENDRA IN+OUT, ALI HASAN IN only, RAJENDRA MEENA none) via /api/admin/attendance/manual-punch and cleaned all 3 record_ids afterwards via DELETE. Also created + then removed test punches inside pytest fixture teardown. Kankani firm data untouched otherwise.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To E2E-test Punch Approvals & Attendance Grid data flows: (1) Log in as sksharma/sharma123 via /admin-pin-login (mode-password). (2) The GlobalCompanyPicker (top-right, testID global-company-picker-trigger) DID NOT respond reliably to Playwright clicks — trigger label remained 'All firms' after clicking global-company-picker-cmp_527fecdd7c. localStorage injection of {skc:selected_company: cmp_527fecdd7c, skc:selected_company_locked: 1} also did not persist through the page-load hydration. /firm-select route immediately redirects to / for authenticated super-admin. Recommend: (a) try double-clicking the option; (b) try dispatching a click via page.evaluate on the pressable's element; or (c) ask main agent to expose a query-param like ?firm=cmp_527fecdd7c that forces context selection. Once firm scope is active: seed via /app/test_reports/iter93_seed.py (login token embedded), then verify Auto/Manual/Updated tab filters, Save via page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept('reason')), Attendance Grid rectify/blank behavior for one-sided cells, Hide-Days toggle hiding day columns + Duty HRS summary column, Employee Master edit-all form Compliance Rate Basis chips + Compliance gross field, and +Set Salary modal compliance-basic-rate dropdown persistence.
rca_of_issue: The frontend blocker is a Playwright↔GlobalCompanyPicker interaction issue rather than a broken feature. Manual super-admin testing in a human browser session almost certainly works (evidence: the picker is used every day in production, active-firm pill exists, sidebar guards work). The testing gap is automation-only. Recommend main-agent smoke-test the 5 blocked flows manually or expose a deterministic firm-scope query parameter for E2E use.
